final:
module ALU_32bit (
    input [31:0] obf_A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg zero_flag
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b000: result = obf_A + B; // Add
            3'b001: result = obf_A - B; // Subtract
            3'b010: result = obf_A & B; // AND
            3'b011: result = obf_A | B; // OR
            3'b100: result = obf_A ^ B; // XOR
            default: result = 32'b0; // Default case
        endcase
        zero_flag = (result == 32'b0);
    end
endmodule
